name: Gini API
description: Invoice/document extraction API used by DE banks for photo-to-transfer.

seo.title: Gini API — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Gini API: Invoice/document extraction API used by DE banks for photo-to-transfer.

when_to_use: Parsing bank statements and financial documents via OCR API
Extracting line-item data from invoices for accounts payable
Automating document processing for fintech onboarding flows
Integrating document parsing into expense management tools

pros: Accurate invoice extraction tuned for DE/EU
Used in production by major German banks
cons: Regional focus limits non-EU document coverage
Enterprise sales cycle, not self-serve friendly
Generic docs harder than modern API peers
review.verdict: The go-to document extraction API for German banking use cases, less compelling elsewhere.
review.best_for: German and EU fintechs building photo-to-transfer or invoice flows
review.not_for: Global document AI needs or teams wanting a free tier to evaluate

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
